evidence.description: Conservative capacity estimate using node allocatable minus the largest node.

findings.message: Cluster may not have enough requested capacity headroom to tolerate one worker node loss.
findings.recommendation: Add capacity or reduce requests before upgrade. Estimated remaining capacity after one-node loss: 1900m CPU.
